rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BONNIE ORA SHERK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/22/2023. (1) Petition and (proposed) Order must set forth on Waiver of Account in the caption. CRC 7.102; (2) Notice of hearing must be sent to the other heir. PC 11000; (3) Inventory and Appraisal and Petition must set forth a legal description of the real property. PC 8850(a)(1). CRC 7.651. Proposed Order presents a legal description while neither Inventory and Appraisal nor Petition is silent. All required information must be on file two weeks prior to the next hearing.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE TRUST CREATED BY AGREEMENT DATED NOVEMBER 22, 1994 BY CHARRA DE MARCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 2/22/2023. Amended Petition (Petition) to clarify the following information: (1) Petition to set forth the names and addresses of all living beneficiaries and other interested persons known to the petitioner. PC 17201. Petition #5 states Russell and Gregory are the beneficiaries; however, the First Amendment to the Trust does not mirror the allegation. (2) Petition to state whether a guardian ad litem should be appointed. The settlor's "then living grandchildren" would be the remaining beneficiaries; however, Petition does not clearly specify the settlor's child(ren) or grandchild(ren). (3) Once the trust beneficiaries are properly identified, Notice of Hearing to and Waiver of Bond must be on file to mirror the above information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. DE-120 Notice of Hearing insufficient. (2) Petition #8 must be properly supplemented to identify all heirs. Second Amended Notice of Hearing filed on 12/16/2022 shows DE-120 Form, Notice of Hearing, was mailed to numerous persons; however, each recipient's information have not been provided.
